What is your return policy?: We accept returns within 30 days of delivery. Items must be unworn, unwashed, and have the original tags attached.
How long does shipping take?: Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days. Express shipping takes 1-2 business days. International shipping varies between 7-14 days.
How can I track my order?: Once your order ships, you will receive an email with a tracking link. You can also track it in your account under 'Order History'.
Do you ship internationally?: Yes, we ship worldwide! Shipping costs and times will be calculated at checkout based on your location.
How do I know my size?: You can find our detailed Size Guide on every product page, located just below the size selection buttons.
Do your clothes run true to size?: Most of our items run true to size. If a specific item runs small or large, we note it in the product description.
What payment methods do you accept?: We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay.
Can I change or cancel my order?: We process orders very quickly. If you need to cancel or change your order, please contact us within 1 hour of placing it.
How do I exchange an item?: To exchange an item, please return your original item for a refund and place a new order for the correct size or color.
Are returns free?: We offer free returns for all domestic orders. International customers are responsible for return shipping costs.
What if I received a damaged item?: We are so sorry! Please contact our support team with a photo of the damaged item within 48 hours of delivery, and we will send a replacement immediately.
What if an item is missing from my packa: Sometimes items ship separately from different warehouses. Check your email for multiple tracking numbers. If something is truly missing, contact support.
Can I use multiple discount codes?: Only one discount code can be applied per order. However, discount codes can sometimes be combined with site-wide sales.
Do you restock sold-out items?: We frequently restock our core collection. For limited-edition drops, we usually do not restock. You can sign up for 'Back in Stock' email notifications on the product page.
How should I wash my clothes?: Care instructions are printed on the inner tag of every garment. We generally recommend washing in cold water and hanging to dry to preserve the fabric.
